special_mechanics.name: Swimming
special_mechanics.description: Ariel swims through underwater levels; primary locomotion mechanic

special_mechanics.name: Bubble Attack
special_mechanics.description: Ariel can shoot bubbles to trap foes; bubbles can be powered up via treasure chests for increased power and range

special_mechanics.name: Digging
special_mechanics.description: Ariel can dig through sand to find treasure

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Sources contain only high-level gameplay descriptions and reception data. No precise physics parameters, gravity values, acceleration rates, or sub-pixel system information documented in available sources. Game mechanics are swimming-based rather than traditional platformer jump physics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - The Little Mermaid (NES)
